header.reference: FROZEN CANONICAL corpus distribution — all downstream fingerprinting scores against this
header.source: libretto.core.axes_v3.metrics_for (33 discovered axes) over grammar/ (real songs)
header.balancing: GENRE-BALANCED global distribution: each genre resampled to K=max-genre-count points so genres contribute equally to the global CDF/percentiles (removes corpus-imbalance skew). Per-genre bands (genre_conditioned) are raw.
header.scoring: percentile(v) = 100 * mean(values <= v) using the per-axis 'values' array (genre-balanced empirical CDF)
header.axis_system: v3 — 33 axes discovered from scratch by the axis_evolve self-loop
header.regenerate_with: python -m libretto.corpus.distribution (deliberate only — changes all coordinates)
